title: 美伊战争实时局势摘要
description: 基于 CBS/AP/NYT/Independent 等主流媒体的实时战况更新

title.zh: 以军宣称击杀180名真主党武装，霍尔木兹海峡通航降至10%
title.en: Israel claims 180 Hezbollah killed, Strait of Hormuz traffic drops to 10%

title.zh: 以色列空袭黎巴嫩安全部队，教皇批评伊朗战争
title.en: Israel Strikes Lebanese Security Forces, Pope Criticizes Iran War

title.zh: 美伊伊斯兰堡谈判启动：以色列持续轰炸黎巴嫩，伊朗提出谈判前提，霍尔木兹海峡运输低迷
title.en: US-Iran Islamabad Talks Begin: Israel Continues Lebanon Bombing, Iran Sets Preconditions, Hormuz Traffic低迷

title.zh: 伊斯兰堡谈判在即：万斯启程赴巴，伊朗提出停火前提，霍尔木兹海峡交通低迷
title.en: Islamabad Talks Loom: Vance Departs for Pakistan, Iran Sets Ceasefire Conditions, Hormuz Traffic Remains Low

title.zh: 美伊战争动态：黎巴嫩空袭造成重大平民伤亡，万斯赴巴谈判
title.en: Iran War Developments: Lebanon Strikes Cause Civilian Casualties, Vance to Pakistan

title.zh: 伊斯兰堡会谈前夕：多国外交密集斡旋，伊朗银行恢复运营
title.en: Eve of Islamabad Talks: Intensive Diplomatic Mediation, Iranian Banks to Resume Operations

title.zh: 科威特指控伊朗违反停火，乌克兰击落伊朗无人机
title.en: Kuwait Accuses Iran of Ceasefire Violation, Ukraine Downs Iranian Drones

title.zh: 多国谴责黎巴嫩袭击，美伊停火争议持续
title.en: Multiple Countries Condemn Lebanon Attacks, US-Iran Ceasefire Dispute Continues

title.zh: IMF警告伊朗战争拖累全球经济增长，经济前景黯淡
title.en: IMF Warns Iran War Will Slow Global Economic Growth as Outlook Darkens
